summary: Iteration 5 retest — admin approve-credits-balance flow fully verified. Initial balance 1,500 ر.س; after approve 5,000 → 6,500; reject 25,000 → remains 6,500; approve 10,000 → 16,500; approve 50,000 → 66,500. Status badges (مقبول/مرفوض) update correctly; approve/reject buttons disappear once processed; header shows '0 قيد المراجعة'. Regression checks pass: workshop wallet still 1,500 (separate provider — intentional), workshop ads screen renders ads list + promote buttons, customer /home shows 4 sponsored ads (إعلانات ممولة), customer tab bar has 5 tabs (الرئيسية/الخدمات/السلة/الإشعارات/حسابي). No red screen / console errors observed.
test_report_links: Playwright automation run output (see browser automation logs)
critical_code_review_comments: creditWallet uses functional setState updaters for both transactions and wallet — correct, no stale-closure risk.
Admin wallet-requests mock list is in local state only; on page reload the approved/rejected statuses and any credited balance resets (expected for current mock scope).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing mock requests req-1001..req-1004 and initialWallet 1500.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin credits flow is stable via creditWallet() additive helper. Note: /admin/* and /workshop-dashboard/* each mount their own <WalletProvider>, so balances are intentionally independent between those sections. Customer home tab bar uses 5 tabs; workshop-dashboard also uses 5 tabs; do not confuse the two when asserting tab counts.
rca_of_issue: Previous stale-closure bug (balance not updating after approve) is resolved. The fix adds creditWallet(amount, note) to WalletContext that uses functional setState updaters: setTransactions(prev => [tx, ...prev]) and setWallet(prev => ({...prev, balance: prev.balance + amount})). This guarantees each sequential approve reads the latest wallet balance, correctly producing 1500→6500→(reject 6500)→16500→66500.
